name: Guardforce AI Co., Ltd.
business: The principal activities of the Company include providing Secured Logistics solutions and developing AI&Robotics Solutions. The Company engages principally in providing cash management and handling services located in Thailand. Beginning March 2020, AI Hong Kong commenced AI&Robotics solution business of selling and leasing robots.

exposures.sentence: The principal activities of the Company include providing Secured Logistics solutions and developing AI&Robotics Solutions.
The Company engages principally in providing cash management and handling services located in Thailand.
